mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.author, c.title, c.content, c.category, c.image_url as imageUrl, c.created_at as createdAt, COALESCE(u.nickname, c.author) as nickname FROM community c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.author = u.username ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.id, c.author, c.title, c.content, c.category, c.image_url as imageUrl, c.created_at as createdAt, COALESCE(u.nickname, c.author) as nickname FROM community c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.author = u.username WHERE c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.id, c.author, c.title, c.content, c.category, c.image_url as imageUrl, c.created_at as createdAt, COALESCE(u.nickname, c.author) as nickname FROM community c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.author = u.username WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT c.id, c.author, c.title, c.content, c.category, c.image_url as imageUrl, c.created_at as createdAt, COALESCE(u.nickname, c.author) as nickname FROM community c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.author = u.username WHERE c.author = #{author} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community (author, title, content, category, image_url) VALUES (#{author}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{imageUrl})
